theorem:  insertionsort_sorted
sample:   3
attempt:  init

[proof]
have insert_sorted : ∀ (t : T) (l : List T), Sorted l → Sorted (insert_ t l) := by
  intro t l
  induction l with
  | nil =>
      intro s
      exact lemma_hint_0 t
  | cons x xs IH =>
      intro s
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
          simp [insert_]
          by_cases p : t < x
          · simp [p]
            exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton (by simpa using not_lt_of_ge (le_of_lt p))
          · exact lemma_hint_1 t x p
      | cons h ts =>
          by_cases p : t < x
          · exact lemma_hint_17 t x (h :: ts) (by
              intro hs
              exact IH hs) s p
          · have hs : Sorted (h :: ts) := lemma_hint_18 x h ts s
            have ih' : Sorted (insert_ t (h :: ts)) := by
              exact IH hs
            exact lemma_hint_14 t x h ts p (by
              intro hs'
              exact IH hs') s
induction l with
| nil =>
    simp [insertionsort, Sorted.nil]
| cons x xs IH =>
    simp [insertionsort]
    exact insert_sorted x (insertionsort xs) IH

[lean error]
location:
                  exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton (by simpa using not_lt_of_ge (le_of_lt p))
                · exact lemma_hint_1 t x p
                 ^
            | cons h ts =>
error: Type mismatch
  lemma_hint_1 t x p
has type
  Sorted (x :: insert_ t [])
but is expected to have type
  Sorted (if t < x then [t, x] else [x, t])

location:
                    exact IH hs
                  exact lemma_hint_14 t x h ts p (by
                       ^
                    intro hs'
error: Function expected at
  lemma_hint_14 t x h ts p ?m.153
but this term has type
  Sorted (insert_ t (h :: ts))
Note: Expected a function because this term is being applied to the argument
  s
